_publications._publicationTitle: Whole exome sequencing reveals the maintained polyclonal nature from primary to metastatic malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumor in two patients with NF1.

_contextSnippet: Three shRNA constructs were used to knockdown Trim23 expression and utilized for in vitro experiments. The line with the most robust knockdown was chosen for in vivo testing
details: Three shRNA constructs successfully knocked down Trim23 expression, with one line showing the most robust knockdown selected for in vivo testing
